loginPrompt: Please log in with your Discord account to view the dashboard.
networkErrorPrompt: Please check your network connection and try again.

selectGuild.title: Select a Server
selectGuild.subtitleDashboard: Select a server to view the dashboard
selectGuild.emptyDesc: You need a server where you have administrator or server management permissions.

section1.title: 1. Information We Collect
section1.intro: Onyu (hereinafter "the Bot") collects the following information to provide its services.
section1.item1: Discord user ID, nickname, and avatar URL
section1.item3: Voice channel join/leave times, channel ID, and microphone status
section1.item4: Co-presence records (which members were in the voice channel together)
section1.item5: Newbie mission progress and Moco hunt records

section2.title: 2. How We Use Information
section2.item1: Providing voice channel activity statistics (dashboard visualization)
section2.item4: Providing newbie management and onboarding features

section3.title: 3. Third-Party Disclosure
section3.body1: The Bot transmits voice activity statistics (aggregated data that cannot identify individuals) to the Google Gemini API to provide AI analysis features. The transmitted data does not include Discord user IDs or nicknames — only server-level aggregated activity durations are sent.
section3.body2: No personal information is shared with any other third parties.

section4.title: 4. Data Retention and Deletion
section4.body1: Collected voice activity data is retained for a default of 90 days, and data past the retention period is automatically deleted daily.
section4.body2: Users may request deletion of their data at any time. After logging in to the dashboard, calling the DELETE /api/users/me/data API will immediately delete all voice activity records for that user.

section5.title: 5. Cookies
section5.body: The web dashboard stores a JWT token in an httpOnly cookie for Discord OAuth2 authentication. This cookie expires after 1 hour and is immediately deleted upon logout. No tracking cookies are used.

section6.title: 6. Data Security
section6.item1: All API communications are encrypted via HTTPS
section6.item2: Authentication tokens are protected against tampering with JWT signatures
section6.item3: Database access is restricted to the server's internal network
section6.item4: API requests are protected by rate limiting

section7.title: 7. Contact
section7.body: For inquiries regarding personal information processing, please contact the administrator of the Discord server where the bot operates.

section1.title: 1. Service Overview
section1.body: Onyu (hereinafter "the Service") is a Discord bot and web dashboard that provides voice channel activity tracking, AI-based analysis reports, music playback, newbie management, and inactive member classification for Discord servers.

section2.title: 2. Terms of Use
section2.item1: A Discord account is required to use the Service
section2.item2: Administrator permissions on the target server are required to invite the bot
section2.item3: The web dashboard is accessible only to users with server management permissions (ADMINISTRATOR or MANAGE_GUILD)
section2.item4: You must comply with Discord's Terms of Service and Community Guidelines when using the Service

section3.title: 3. Prohibited Activities
section3.item1: Automated mass requests to the bot or API (scraping, bot attacks, etc.)
section3.item2: Exploiting vulnerabilities in the Service or unauthorized access to other users' data
section3.item3: Using the bot for activities that violate Discord's Terms of Service
section3.item4: Disrupting the normal operation of the Service

section4.title: 4. Service Changes and Termination
section4.body: The operator may change or terminate part or all of the Service without prior notice. The operator is not responsible for data loss due to service interruption.

section5.title: 5. Disclaimer
section5.item1: The Service is provided "AS IS" without warranty of fitness for a particular purpose or stability
section5.item2: The operator is not responsible for service interruptions caused by failures of external services such as Discord API or Google Gemini API
section5.item3: 100% accuracy of voice activity data is not guaranteed (some data may be missed due to network delays, bot restarts, etc.)
section5.item4: The operator does not intervene in disputes between users

section6.title: 6. Changes to Terms
section6.body: These Terms may be updated as needed, and changes will be announced within the Service. If you do not agree to the updated Terms, you may stop using the Service and remove the bot from your server.

section7.title: 7. Contact
section7.body: For inquiries regarding use of the Service, please contact the administrator of the Discord server where the bot operates.
